untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific metrics (implied volatility percentile, expected price move magnitude, days to expiration, spread structure selection logic, time decay tolerance) that are not available in the provided price/technical indicator set. These require options market data (IV surface, option Greeks, extrinsic value decay curves) which are outside the scope of standard OHLCV and technical analysis indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using hvol_20 (historical volatility as proxy for IV regime), atr_14 (expected movement magnitude), and price position relative to sma_20 (trend context). However, the signal's core logic—selecting between backspread/straddle/strangle based on IV percentile and expected move relative to time decay risk—cannot be properly translated without access to option chain data and Greeks calculations.
